title: HXS's_Animation_Optimization
description: Optimization of actions for my mod
body:
The animations of the [Animation Overhaul mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/animationoverhaul) have been optimized. Currently, only walking,running and jumping have been optimized. More optimizations may be added in the future. This resource pack does not handle the compatibility issues of any mods. Please be aware of this. Additionally, you need to load this resource pack from the main menu of the game rather than within an existing save file.

Starting from version 2.0, only optimizations for [SmoothPlayerAnimations](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothplayeranimations) are provided. 
The optimization content of AnimationOverhaul requires downloading the previous version (prior to 2.0).
